settings.title: Durable Stainless Steel Build
settings.text: Rust- and corrosion-resistant 304 stainless steel, built to last in any bathroom environment.

settings.title: Powerful, Gentle Spray
settings.text: Balanced water pressure for precise cleaning without discomfort — suitable for all ages.

settings.title: 360° Flexible Hose
settings.text: Full-range movement with a flexible hose that reaches every angle with ease.

settings.title: Leak-Proof Design
settings.text: Anti-leak technology ensures reliable performance with no dripping — guaranteed.

settings.title: DIY-Friendly Installation
settings.text: No plumber needed. Quick and simple setup in minutes with universal fittings.

settings.title: Water-Saving Nozzle
settings.text: Eco-friendly spray design reduces water usage by up to 40% while maintaining strong pressure.

settings.title: Universal Compatibility
settings.text: Fits all standard plumbing connections — works with any toilet setup in Pakistan.
